# Sri Harish K Raju

Sri Harish K Raju is a holistic practitioner, educator, and career counsellor based in Bangalore, India, offering services in Sound Healing, Reiki Therapy, MIDNA Genetic Brain Profiling, and Chinmaya Balavihar Sanskrit education.

## Contact Details
- Name: Sri Harish K Raju
- Phone: +91 98458 85305
- Email: harish19762707@gmail.com
- Location: Mahalakshmi Layout, Bangalore, Karnataka, India
- Website: https://harishkraju.com/

## Core Services

### 1. Sound Healing & Reiki Therapy
- **Sound Healing:** Certified Sound Healing Therapist using Tibetan singing bowls and vibrational frequencies to activate the vagus nerve, reduce stress/cortisol, and manage chronic pain.
- **Reiki Healing:** Certified Reiki Practitioner offering sessions for physical restoration and emotional balance.
- **Past Life Regression:** Certified practitioner utilizing regression therapy for processing stored emotional patterns.

### 2. MIDNA Genetic Brain Profiling (GBP) & Mentoring
- **MIDNA GBP Expert:** Certified Genetic Brain Profile Consultant using Dermatoglyphics (fingerprint-based neuroscience) for personality mapping, talent discovery, and learning potential analysis from age 2.
- **Career & Life Mentoring:** Custom guidance for students (after 10th and 12th grades), parenting coaching, and professional career pathing.

### 3. Chinmaya Balavihar Sanskrit Teaching
- **Balavihar Sevak:** Serving children (ages 5-16) since 2001, teaching values, sacred scriptures, Bhagavad Gita chanting, Vishnu Sahasranama, and Sanskrit.
- **Class Formats:** Available in both online and offline formats.
